race.comment: The well-related JASON DARREN (2) (full to G2 winner and G1 placed Graff) has accrued four minor placings from six runs this preparation. Continued the trend last time out when runner-up over 1500m at Muswellbrook after he was in the firing line all the way. Nicely placed to find winning ways. WHITTELLO SUN (6) registered a strong win at Muswellbrook two runs ago. Decent effort last time out when fourth over 1400m at Tamworth, beaten 2.25 lengths. Has the class to produce another win. ZOU BIG BOY (1) was below his best last time out when 12 lengths from the winner in ninth over 1605m at Coffs Harbour. Has the pace to be in a prominent position from the outset and will be in this for a long way. MRS BULL (3) hasn't been far away recently including last time out when third over 1400m at Dubbo. Backmarker who keeps coming. A big run is expected.
